name: IRC_SEARCH_INDEX_UPG_TRK
description: Table used for tracking upgrade of search indexes.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_TRK_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to IRC_SEARCH_INDEX_UPGRADES.

columns.Name: ENTITY_SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: The sub entity type (ex: EXTERNAL) for which the index must be upgraded.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the index upgrade.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp for when the upgrade has started.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp for when the upgrade has completed.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_FAILURE_REASON
columns.Comments: The upgrade failure reason.

columns.Name: ASYNC_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Holds task id returned for  OSCS asynch operation.

columns.Name: LATEST_INDEX_VERSION
columns.Comments: Specifies the latest version of OSCS Index.

columns.Name: LATEST_INDEX_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies the latest name of OSCS Index.

columns.Name: UPGRADE_RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the number of times upgrade operation has been retried.

columns.Name: REINDEX_ATTEMPTED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the number of times re-index operation is attempted but returned 429 response code.

columns.Name: INDEX_TO_BE_PURGED
columns.Comments: Specifies the name of the old index to be purged after a specified period determined by profile options.

columns.Name: INDEX_PURGE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of index purge. Ex. COMPLETED, PENDING.

columns.Name: INDEX_PURGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp for when the index is purged.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
